title: eyes.everywhere
description: A small horror mod that stalks you with more than two eyes. (Not a dweller)
body:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**A List of features:**

_Entities:_
- Entity.eyes.watching: Stalks you. Take at least 8 Blocks of distance. Can open doors. Looks like a player. Killable.
- Entity.eyes.screaming: Big mouth. Does not like to be looked at. Sometimes tears down walls. Killable.
- Entity.eyes.searching: Be quiet. Dont move. Dont let it find you. Unkillable.
  
_Gear:_
- Knife: Fast reload, 5 Damage
- Sword of Pain: 9 Damage, endgame item
- Big clump of flesh: helps against "Paranoia"
- Crucifix: If used, can banish Monsters for a short amount of time (Chance of working depending on the version)
- Glitchtable: Used to enchant items randomly using Glitchorbs, dropped by entities of varios types

    There will also be many different events, but there are too many to list them all.
For more info, enter my YT Channel!

</details>

There is a new thread that enters your world. Multiple new entities that want to hurt you. I recommend not reading the spoilers, because it will give you a better expierience.
